reviews.comment:
Cuando me hice socio me dijeron que el estacionamiento se podía usar sin reserva y una vez lleno no entraba más nadie. No era posible la reserva. Fui unos días antes de la temporada para conseguir estacionamiento. Además que te cobran la cochera termina siendo movil. Ahora fui el Lunes 10/04 ya fuera de temporada a estacionar por 4 días. Supiestamente cuando me hice socio me dijeron que eran 5 días gratis. Me atendió una señora de mala manera diciendo que tenía que reservar con tiempo. A lo que le explique que me dijeron que era sin reserva. El precio por dejarlo ahí sin reserva era igual al de otros estacionamientos. Me fui. Entiendo que cuidar a los socios no es la política del Aca.

Aclaro que los chicos del estacionamiento siempte tienen la mejor predisposición y trataron de buscar una solución, cosa que en administración no paso.

(Translated by Google)
When I became a member, I was told the parking lot could be used without a reservation, and once it was full, no one could get in. Reservations weren't possible. I went a few days before the season to get a spot. Plus, they charge you, so the parking lot ends up being mobile. Now, on Monday, April 10, during the off-season, I went to park for four days. Supposedly, when I became a member, I was told it was free for five days. A woman rudely greeted me, saying I had to reserve ahead of time. I explained that I was told it was free. The price for parking there without a reservation was the same as other parking lots. I left. I understand that taking care of members isn't ACA's policy.

I should clarify that the parking guys are always very helpful and tried to find a solution, something that didn't happen with the administration.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSME02NlNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Area de Servicios de una manzana,  Intalaciones del Automóvil Club Argentino con gran cantidad de  cocheras permanentes o temporales. Para esto último se debe ser Socio de la Instutución.

(Translated by Google)
The service area covers one city block and includes facilities belonging to the Argentine Automobile Club, offering a large number of permanent and temporary parking spaces. Membership in the club is required for temporary parking.
